name: THE FINLEY - PINK PUNCH
description: Designed for active little swimmers, The Finley is the ultimate girls’ long sleeve swim set combining sun protection, comfort, and high visibility for safer days in and around the water. This two-piece set features a long sleeve rash guard top paired with biker-style swim shorts, giving your child full coverage where it matters most, without restricting movement. Whether she’s swimming or playing lakeside, The Finley is built to keep up. Why parents love THE FINLEY: Long sleeve rash guard for full upper-body sun protection Biker swim shorts for extra coverage and stay-put comfort High-visibility neon colors for improved water safety Flexible fit, size down for a snug biker short look or true-to-size for a relaxed fit Designed for active play, swimming, and all-day wear

name: Children's Scuba Goggles
description: Meet your children's new favorite pair of goggles! Whether your child is working on putting their face in the water while taking a bath or diving for rings in the pool - these are the perfect goggles to keep their eyes protected and comfortable. Complete the look with our Adult Scuba Goggles, perfect for Mommy & Me swim days! Designed with an ultra-soft, leak-proof seal and an easily adjustable strap, they provide a secure fit for all-day water adventures. The anti-fog lenses ensure crystal-clear vision. Fun, functional, and kid-approved, these goggles make every splash more exciting!

name: Coastal Cowgirl Beach Hat w/ Turquoise
description: The Coastal Cowgirl Hat is your effortless statement piece for long beach days, boat rides, and sunset walks. Crafted from breathable woven straw, it features a softly structured crown and a curved brim that provides flattering sun coverage while keeping things light and airy. The standout detail? A turquoise beaded band that wraps the crown, a subtle but striking nod to clear water, open skies, and carefree summer living. The pop of turquoise adds just the right amount of personality, elevating this classic silhouette into something uniquely TANA ANA.

name: The Everyday Lake Tote
description: Meet your new go-to carryall for lake days, pool afternoons, and farmers market mornings. This woven straw tote blends timeless texture with playful color, featuring vertical pink stripes and matching straps for a bold yet feminine finish. Lightweight yet roomy, it’s designed to hold all your warm-weather essentials, sunscreen, a good book, snacks for the kids, and your favorite TANA ANA suit. The structured silhouette keeps it polished, while the soft woven body makes it easy to grab and go.

name: THE MINI ALEX - Boys Swim Shorts
description: Meet The Mini Alex, a modern take on boys’ swim shorts designed for movement, comfort, and water safety. Inspired by classic European swim style, these aren’t your typical baggy swim trunks, they’re a streamlined, stay-put fit that lets little boys move freely and confidently in and out of the water. Unlike traditional swim trunks that can feel heavy or restrictive, The Mini Alex features a shorter, more tailored silhouette that won’t weigh him down, whether he’s swimming, climbing, running, or playing all day. Why parents (and kids) love The Mini Alex: European-inspired, streamlined fit for better movement Designed to stay in place, no sagging or bunching Lightweight, quick-dry fabric for all-day comfort Shorter length for freedom of movement in and out of the water Available in high-visibility colors for added water safety

description: Make your beach trip unforgettable for your little one with our Sea-Shell Mesh Bag, the perfect kids beach bag for shell collecting, poolside fun, and lake-life adventures. name: Women's Beach Cover-Up
description: Effortlessly chic and endlessly versatile, meet the TANA ANA Women’s Knit Cover-Up. Available in baby blue, cloud white, and midnight black, this lightweight knit is perfect for throwing on over your swimsuit from the pool to the patio. Designed for comfort and style, size up for a relaxed, beachy fit or stay true to size for a more fitted, snatched look. A timeless summer staple you’ll reach for all season long!

name: Beach Tote Bag
description: Meet your new go-to women’s beach tote bag, designed to carry it all in style. Crafted from durable, quick-dry material, this spacious tote easily fits towels, sunscreen, snacks, and more. Its sleek, minimalist design pairs perfectly with your TANA ANA swimwear, taking you from the pool to the lake with ease. Built for everyday adventure, this tote combines function and fashion, making it the perfect companion for sunny days on the water.

name: THE MINI TRISH - Girls One Piece
description: Meet The Mini Trish, a girls’ one-piece swimsuit designed to match Mom, combining elevated style, comfortable support, and all-day wearability for your little one. Inspired by our best-selling women’s silhouette, this suit brings a fashion-forward fit to girls’ swimwear, without sacrificing comfort or function. Whether she’s swimming, playing, or twinning with you, The Mini Trish is made to move with her and stay in place. Why parents love The Mini Trish: Flattering one-piece silhouette inspired by the women’s Trish Designed for comfort + movement, no tugging or adjusting Soft, stretchy fabric that keeps up with active play Part of the Mommy & Me collection for matching moments High-quality construction made for pool, lake, and beach days

name: THE ESTHER - Girl's Long Sleeve Swimsuit
description: Meet The Esther, a girls’ long sleeve one-piece swimsuit with a front zipper and mock neckline, designed for full sun coverage, easy changes, and all-day comfort. Created for active little swimmers, this suit delivers the perfect balance of function, protection, and style. The mock neck design adds extra coverage where it matters most, while the front zipper makes getting dressed (and undressed) quick and frustration-free, for both kids and parents. Whether she’s swimming, splashing, or playing lakeside, The Esther is built to stay in place so she can move freely and confidently. Why parents love The Esther: Front zipper closure for easy on-and-off Mock neckline for added sun protection on the chest and neck Long sleeves for full upper-body coverage One-piece design for a secure, stay-put fit Comfortable, flexible fabric made for active play and swimming
shortDescription: Meet The Esther, a girls’ long sleeve one-piece swimsuit with a front zipper and mock neckline, designed for full sun coverage, easy changes
